name: Astral-Gardevoir (Celestial Oracle)
description: A divine synthesis of Gardevoir and Gothitelle. It acts as the multiversal oracle, seeing through the veil of time and space to predict entropic anomalies before they manifest.
originLore: Born from the convergence of pure empathy and the cosmic abyss. This entity does not merely sense emotions; it feels the collective pulse of the multiversal core, weaving the threads of destiny into its gothic gown.

lore.celestialConcordance: The Astral-Gardevoir serves as the bridge between the creators and the created, translating the chaotic noise of the void into harmonic cosmic signals.

quantumResonators.name: Moonblast (Astral)
quantumResonators.description: Focuses the light of dying stars into a concentrated beam of purifying energy.

quantumResonators.name: Oracle's Decree
quantumResonators.description: Bends reality to ensure a predicted outcome, guaranteeing the next strategic vector.
